completed_tasks.name: Phase 6 discussion complete — CONTEXT.md + DISCUSSION-LOG.md written

remaining_tasks.name: Run /gsd-plan-phase 6 to generate RESEARCH.md + PLAN.md files from 06-CONTEXT.md
Execute plans covering XP/leveling + gold drops + death penalty + HUD polish + periodic save

decisions.decision: XP tier-flat (10/15/25/150). Level cap 100 as narrative ceiling, curve tuned so boss kill is realistic at level ~8-15. +10 HP / +1 damage / +5 stamina per level. Level-up = banner + gold particle burst, no pause.
decisions.rationale: User wants tall headroom but content-appropriate pacing. Captured as D-01..D-08 in 06-CONTEXT.md.

decisions.decision: Gold drops = Gold_Coin as ItemDropEntity with magnetism (reuses Phase 2 pickup). 5g/8g/15g per tier + 100g boss. Every kill guaranteed. ±30% variance.
decisions.rationale: Consistency with existing item pickup UX. Predictable economy. Captured as D-09..D-12.

decisions.decision: Death penalty applies to ALL deaths (farm + dungeon). -10% gold always. Item loss roll: 60% nothing / 25% lose 1 / 15% lose 2, pool = ANY slot (inventory + hotbar + equipment). Red banner + Toast list on respawn.
decisions.rationale: User explicit: 'qualquer coisa'. Farm cozy is overridden for consistency. Captured as D-13..D-17.

decisions.decision: HUD polish scope: XP bar above hotbar + Lv label, NineSlice clock panel, gold icon panel, quest tracker with icon + NineSlice, AND cleanup of the ugly HP/MP/STA in-bar text (Claude's Discretion on remove/shrink/tooltip/mini-panel).
decisions.rationale: User flagged in-bar text as ugly mid-discussion; folded into scope. Captured as D-18..D-19.

decisions.decision: Save: periodic auto-save every ~30s of gameplay + level-up + post-death triggers, on top of existing day-advance/shop-close/boss-victory/pre-death/F5. Save version v8→v9 adds MaxHP/MaxStamina/BaseDamageBonus persistence. Perf guard in D-21 for write-on-dirty/async if profiling shows >50ms saves.
decisions.rationale: User wants 'jogo normal' — close the app any time, no lost progress. Captured as D-20..D-24.

uncommitted_files: .planning/STATE.md still shows 'Executing Phase 05' / 'Completed 05-04-PLAN.md' — not updated this session. Phase 5 is actually complete (commit 1651965) and Phase 6 discuss is done. Next session should refresh STATE during /gsd-plan-phase 6 init.
